participant_id.Description: Unique subject identifier, matching the BIDS folder naming (e.g., sub-101)

age.Description: Age of the participant at the time of testing

race.Description: Race of the participant, as self-reported

ethnicity.Description: Ethnicity of the participant, as self-reported

Levels.Hispanic/Latino: Participant identifies as Hispanic or Latino
Levels.Not Hispanic/Latino: Participant does not identify as Hispanic or Latino
